message:
refactor: rustfmt pass, CatchUnwind pin_project migration, version range fix, batch wake optimization

Formatting and structural improvements across the codebase:

- Reformat all fast_cancel.store(true, Ordering::Release) call chains to
  multi-line style across actor.rs, cx.rs, gen_server.rs, lab/runtime.rs,
  record/task.rs, task_handle.rs, and three_lane.rs. No behavioral change.

- HTTP H1 Listener: Migrate CatchUnwind from manual Pin<Box<F>> to
  pin_project, eliminating the heap allocation per connection join and
  enabling the compiler to verify pin safety statically.

- Runtime Builder: Remove unnecessary #[allow(unsafe_code)] on CatchUnwind
  struct (no unsafe code present). Reformat catch_unwind closure.

- Runtime Kernel: Fix SnapshotVersion compatibility check — was using
  `SNAPSHOT_VERSION.major > reg.max_version.major` which ignored minor
  version; now correctly uses `SNAPSHOT_VERSION > reg.max_version` to
  reject controllers that require a future snapshot version.

- Three-Lane Scheduler: Use wrapping_add for WorkerCoordinator wake index
  to prevent potential overflow on 32-bit platforms. Batch finalizer wakes
  with inject_ready_uncounted + add_ready_count + wake_many instead of
  per-task inject_ready + wake_one to reduce atomic contention.

- HTTP Client: Minor import reorder, replace closure with method reference
  for Cell::get.

- Combinator Race: Reformat compile_error! macro invocations.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
